rules.name: OpenAI API Key
rules.remediation: 在 OpenAI 后台 revoke 这个 key，重新生成，放进 .env

rules.name: Anthropic API Key
rules.remediation: 在 Anthropic Console revoke，重新生成

rules.name: Google AI / Gemini API Key
rules.remediation: 在 Google AI Studio / GCP Console 删除并重建

rules.name: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic)
rules.remediation: GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Tokens → Revoke

rules.name: GitHub Fine-grained PAT
rules.remediation: GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Fine-grained tokens → Revoke

rules.name: GitHub OAuth Token
rules.remediation: 在对应 OAuth App 后台 revoke

rules.name: GitHub App Token
rules.remediation: GitHub App 后台重新生成

rules.name: GitLab Personal Access Token
rules.remediation: GitLab Settings → Access Tokens → Revoke

rules.name: AWS Access Key ID
rules.remediation: 在 AWS IAM 控制台 deactivate 这个 access key 并重新生成

rules.name: AWS Secret Access Key
rules.remediation: AWS IAM 控制台 rotate access key

rules.name: Azure Storage Connection String
rules.remediation: Azure Portal → Storage Account → Access keys → Rotate

rules.name: Stripe Live Secret Key
rules.remediation: Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API keys → Roll secret key

rules.name: Stripe Restricted Key
rules.remediation: Stripe Dashboard → Restricted keys → Roll

rules.name: Twilio Account SID
rules.remediation: Account SID 本身不是秘密但常和 auth token 配对，检查附近是否也泄露了 auth token

rules.name: Twilio API Key
rules.remediation: Twilio Console → API Keys → Delete and recreate

rules.name: SendGrid API Key
rules.remediation: SendGrid → Settings → API Keys → Delete

rules.name: Mailgun API Key
rules.remediation: Mailgun → API Security → Reset

rules.name: Slack Token
rules.remediation: 对应 Slack App / Workspace 设置里 revoke

rules.name: Slack Incoming Webhook URL
rules.remediation: Slack App 设置 → Incoming Webhooks → 删除并重建

rules.name: MongoDB Connection String w/ Credentials
rules.remediation: 在 MongoDB Atlas / 自托管里改密码，URL 不要硬编码

rules.name: PostgreSQL URL w/ Password
rules.remediation: 改数据库密码，连接串走 env var 而非源码

rules.name: Redis URL w/ Password
rules.remediation: 改 Redis AUTH 密码

rules.name: JSON Web Token
rules.remediation: 如果是真实生产 token，让 signing key 旋转一下；很多 JWT 是公开演示用，看上下文判断

rules.name: Private Key
rules.remediation: 重新生成 keypair；把旧 key 在所有授权地方 revoke（GitHub deploy keys / SSH authorized_keys / cert authority 等）

rules.name: HuggingFace Access Token
rules.remediation: HuggingFace Settings → Access Tokens → Revoke
